title: PNC Financial Services (PNC) Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on PNC using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what PNC is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale: To calculate the value of PNC from Year 6 to infinity, we use the Gordon Growth Model. This assumes the company will grow at 2.5% perpetually.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale: To calculate the value of PNC from Year 6 to infinity, we use the Gordon Growth Model. This assumes the company will grow at 2.5% perpetually.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Is DCF the best way to value a bank?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "PNC Financial Services (PNC) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.
